component.name: @@NAME_LONG@@
component.summary: CONSTRUCT IDE. AI-native code editing. Redefined.

description.p: CONSTRUCT IDE is a new choice of tool that combines the simplicity of a code editor with what developers need for the core edit-build-debug cycle, powered by AI. See https://github.com/Razisafir/CONSTRUCT-VSCODE for more information.

screenshot.caption: Editing TypeScript and searching for extensions
